incidents.title: #Kuwait Defense Minister Sheikh Abdullah Al-Sabah Thursday stressed importance of continuing efforts to develop civil aviation system & enhance its readiness in accordance with highest standards of security, safety & operational efficiency. In a statement for KUNA, the Public Authority of Civil Aviation (#PACA) said the minister reviewed, during a visit to PACA, key projects & development plans currently being implemented at Kuwait International Airport.  #Kuna

#KUNA Center for Development of Media Skills Thursday concluded a five-day training program about "Skills and Professional Duties of a News Reporter," with participation of several KUNA staff.  #Kuwait

#Kuwait Ministry of Defense Undersecretary Sheikh Dr. Abdullah Al-Sabah is on an official visit to #Sweden for talks with senior political & military officials as part of the ministry's 2025-30 strategic plan aimed at strengthening international partnerships & exchanging expertise.  #Kuna
Iran war latest: Reconstruction cash for Iran not discussed with Gulf states, says Rubio

#Kuwait 1st Deputy Premier, Interior Minister Sheikh Fahad Al-Sabah said Thursday security authorities have intercepted nearly 95% of drug smuggling shipments attempting to enter Kuwait. Speaking to #KUNA on the sidelines of launch of national anti-drug awareness campaign, "A Nation Protects You," Sheikh Fahad said the achievement reflects close coordination among relevant state agencies.
Iran war transforms Arab Gulf  region

#EU Thursday announced readiness to aid #Venezuela following the earthquake that struck the country, confirming activation of Copernicus satellite monitoring system to support damage assessment, recovery efforts & monitoring of developments on the ground.  #Kuna

Acting Director-General of #Kuwait News Agency (#KUNA) Mohammad Al-Manai discussed Thursday with #Czech Ambassador to Kuwait Juraj Chmiel ways to enhance media cooperation, particularly in the news sector. Al-Mannai highlighted media's role in showcasing strong relations between Kuwait & Czech Republic & supporting future cooperation across various fields.
Dubai enlisting businesses to help keep it a tourism and finance hub after Iran war

#Bahrain Foreign Minister Dr. Abdullatif Al-Zayani stressed Thursday #Gulf security is an integrated system that cannot be divided, underscoring need for continued coordination among #GCC states & allies. Speaking at the #GCC-US ministerial meeting, Al-Zayani said the region is passing through a critical phase that requires closer cooperation to address challenges & strengthen security & stability.  #Kuna

#Belgian Foreign Minister Maxime Prevot Thursday affirmed readiness to aid #Venezuela following two powerful earthquakes that struck the country overnight. He noted Belgian authorities are closely monitoring developments & stand in solidarity with the Venezuelan people in confronting the disaster's aftermath.  #Kuna

The Mohammed Bin Rashid Establishment for Small and Medium Enterprises Development (Dubai SME), part of the Dubai Department of Economy and Tourism, announces the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the Hyatt hotels in Dubai. This strategic collaboration underscores a shared commitment to supporting SMEs in Dubai, in line with the city’s vision of fostering innovation, entrepreneurship, and sustainable economic diversification, and advancing the goals of the Dubai Economic Agenda, D33, to consolidate Dubai’s position as a leading global city for business and leisure.

ترأس معالي الفريق ضاحي خلفان تميم، نائب رئيس الشرطة والأمن العام في دبي رئيس مجلس القيادات الشرطية الاتحادي، الاجتماع الثالث للمجلس لعام 2026، وذلك بحضور قادة الشرطة وكبار الضباط والمسؤولين في وزارة الداخلية والقيادات العامة للشرطة، واستعرض المجلس عدداً من العروض التقديمية والتقارير الأمنية والسياسات ذات الصلة بالأداء الأمني، كما ناقش عدداً من الموضوعات، شملت نتائج استخدام خدمة "الشرطة في هاتفك" وهي خدمة ذكية أطلقتها وزارة الداخلية عبر تطبيقها الذكي "MOIUAE"، إلى جانب أعمال اللجنة الدائمة للأسلحة والمتفجرات، وتناول الاجتماع مواضيع عدة والتي تدعم توجهات الدولة في مجال الذكاء الاصطناعي.
